name: Stir Fry Pork with Peapods
recipeIngredient: 1/2 tsp Fish sauce or to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. In a wok, heat vegetable oil over medium heat until hot.
2. Cook garlic until golden brown.
3. Add pork and cook for 3-4 minutes.
4. Add all vegetables and stir together for 1-2 minutes.
5. Add remaining ingredients and cook for 3-4 minutes longer.
6. Serve hot over warm cooked rice.
